recommendedPrompt: Read README.md if present, then run "node atm.mjs next --json" from the repository root. If the result includes ATM_USER_NOTICE or evidence.userNotice, show it to the user before executing the returned next action. Use .atm/history/tasks/BOOTSTRAP-0001.json, .atm/runtime/profile/default.md, and .atm/history/evidence/BOOTSTRAP-0001.json only as supporting runtime state.
